title: ISV Project Plan & Architecture
summary: Finalized architecture, domain model design, bidirectional sync engine specification, and 5-phase execution roadmap for the Interactive Schema Visualizer (ISV) project. Covers approved decisions: new migrations (not rewrite), Laravel Breeze auth, ProjectTable naming, first-class M2M pivot support, single-schema projects, client-side Mermaid.js rendering. Stack: PHP 8.5, Laravel 13.6, Livewire 4, MariaDB, Tailwind CSS 4, Mermaid.js.

references.description: ISV architecture proposal and user approval
